title: Performance Marketing Manager (m/w/d)
core_responsibilities: Plan and manage SEA & Paid Social campaigns (Google, Bing, LinkedIn, Meta) for B2B lead generation
Own the full conversion funnel from ad to qualified lead, including landing page and A/B testing
Run outbound campaigns and marketing automation via email and LinkedIn
Collaborate with sales team to provide campaign materials and performance insights
Set up tracking, attribution, and pipeline-impact reporting using GA4, Tag Manager, and CRM
recommended_emphasis: Highlight A/B and multivariate testing experience with concrete conversion lift results
Lead with funnel and conversion analysis work — map directly to their lead-gen focus
Emphasise any campaign performance optimisation projects with measurable ROI or CPL metrics
Showcase KPI framework design and reporting work to cover their attribution/reporting requirement
Mention any exposure to CRM tools or marketing automation platforms, even indirectly
If German proficiency exists, state it explicitly and prominently — it is a hard filter
Reference any B2B or tech-sector campaign work to match their B2B/AI product context
